name: io.github.xenarch-ai/xenarch-mcp
description: Xenarch is a non-custodial x402 MCP server. Claude, Cursor, LangChain and CrewAI agents pay for HTTP 402–gated APIs with USDC micropayments on Base L2. Settles on-chain via an immutable splitter — 0% fee, 0.99% hard-capped. A pay-per-crawl alternative to Cloudflare. https://xenarch.com

environmentVariables.description: Wallet private key (hex, 0x-prefixed). Auto-generates on first run if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Max USD to auto-approve without prompting
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX

environmentVariables.description: Wallet private key (hex, 0x-prefixed). Auto-generates on first run if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Max USD to auto-approve without prompting
environmentVariables.name: XENARCH_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'http' to enable HTTP transport
environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
